note: Committed provenance for the lethal-signaling content-load-bearing result (red-team STAKES_CHERRYPICK fix). RTC_TOXIC_DEATH is a G1D task-design override of the MVP-0 frozen default (-1.8); it is NOT a prereg freeze. Separation of fusion from content-degraded controls exists ONLY in a moderate-stakes window (lethal_frac ~0.07-0.10). Below: no pressure (mute also survives). Above: fidelity ceiling (fusion also dies; only oracle survives). All runs RTC_SENSOR_SIGMA=0.3 unless noted.
arms: fusion=real decoded content; scramble=random message; misroute=correct content permuted onto wrong vents (binding broken); mute=uniform random pick; oracle=true argmax (fenced reference).
honest_verdict: SURVIVES_SCOPED. Relative + conditional + installed-by-task-design. fusion_survives (absolute majority) gate FAILS; only relative fusion>controls gates pass. Sibling g1c_spatial (same grown channel) shows content NOT load-bearing in natural foraging => necessity is constructed, not emergent.
